CustomField.description: Help field for the power automate integration
CustomField.formula: TRIM( TechContact__r.Email & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TechContact2__r.Email)), "; " & TechContact2__r.Email, "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TechContact3__r.Email)), "; " & TechContact3__r.Email, "") )
CustomField.label: Tech contact email addresses
